div1.entryFree: Suburbs, the parts of a city that lie without the walls: Meas. I, 2, 98. Meas. I, 2, 98 II, 1, 65. Tw. III, 3, 39. H6A I, 4, 2. H6A I, 4, 2 H8 V, 4, 76. Metaphorically: dwell I but in the s. of your good pleasure? Caes. II, 1, 285 ("the s. were the general resort of disorderly persons in fortified towns, and in London also. It was the same in ancient times". Nares).
